ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Sara McDonald for and with Edward Poole (executor).

The Court expressed that it doesn't approve of the Executor's paying himself without court authority but will allow the petition to go forward. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 27, 2017 is admitted to probate. Edward G. Poole is appointed as the Executor of the estate full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Bastain. Not reported.
